title: Vacanze d'inverno
writer: Oreste Biancoli, Dominique Feri, Camillo Mastrocinque
actors: Michèle Morgan, Georges Marchal, Vittorio De Sica
plot: Alberto Moretti arrives in Cortina D'Ampezzo ,with daughter Marcella,who has just won a TV contest ,the prize of which is a free stay in a luxury hotel.
